summary: Tested Claude AI integration for CV generation/reconstruction in Re'Actif Pro. Backend correctly implements Claude (anthropic, claude-sonnet-4-5-20250929) for CV generation with GPT fallback. Model selection works correctly - only selected models are generated. Analysis includes offres_emploi_suggerees and competences_transversales. Frontend model selection UI shows 'Claude IA' text and works correctly.

minor.issue: Claude API returning 502 BadGateway errors (external service issue), GPT fallback activated successfully

backend_api_tests: POST /api/cv/analyze-text with selected_models=['classique'] - only classique model generated (4914 chars), others empty
POST /api/cv/analyze-text with selected_models=[] - analysis only, no CV models generated (all empty)
GET /api/cv/models returns only populated models for selected ones
GET /api/cv/latest-analysis returns offres_emploi_suggerees (4 items) and competences_transversales (8-9 items)
Backend uses Claude (anthropic, claude-sonnet-4-5-20250929) - verified in logs
Backend falls back to GPT when Claude fails - verified in logs
frontend_ui_tests: CV upload input found with data-testid='cv-upload-input'
4 CV model cards displayed (classique, competences, fonctionnel, mixte)
After file upload, model selection panel appears with data-testid='cv-model-selection'
Model selection UI shows 'Sélectionnez les modèles de CV à générer par Claude IA'
Toggling models updates count text ('1 modèle sélectionné — analyse plus rapide')

claude_ai_integration.description: Backend uses Claude (anthropic, claude-sonnet-4-5-20250929) for CV text generation
claude_ai_integration.status: ✓ VERIFIED - Claude called, falls back to GPT on failure

selective_model_generation.description: Only selected models are generated by Claude/GPT
selective_model_generation.test_result: selected_models=['classique'] generated only classique (4914 chars), others empty

analysis_only_mode.test_result: All CV models empty (0 chars), but analysis completed with offres and competences

offres_emploi_suggerees.description: Analysis returns job suggestions based on CV profile
offres_emploi_suggerees.test_result: 4 job suggestions returned with titre, secteur, type_contrat, competences_requises

competences_transversales.test_result: 8-9 transversal competences identified (communication, travail en equipe, leadership, etc.)

frontend_claude_mention.description: Frontend model selection shows 'Claude IA' text
frontend_claude_mention.ui_text: Sélectionnez les modèles de CV à générer par Claude IA

critical_code_review_comments: Backend: _claude_generate_cv correctly uses anthropic, claude-sonnet-4-5-20250929 model (line 26)
Backend: _run_cv_analysis correctly filters models based on selected_models (lines 83-123)
Backend: GPT fallback implemented in try/except (lines 112-122)
Frontend: Model selection panel correctly mentions 'Claude IA' (line 765)
seed_data_creation: None - tests use anonymous auth and CV text upload
context_for_next_testing_agent: Claude AI integration for CV generation tested. Backend correctly implements Claude (anthropic, claude-sonnet-4-5-20250929) with GPT fallback. Model selection works - only selected models generated. Currently Claude API returns 502 errors (external service issue), but GPT fallback ensures CV generation still works. All features verified: selective model generation, analysis-only mode, offres_emploi_suggerees, competences_transversales, frontend Claude IA mention.
notes: Claude API (anthropic) is currently returning 502 BadGateway errors - this is an external service issue, not a code bug. The implementation correctly falls back to GPT when Claude fails. The code implementation is correct and follows the specified architecture (Claude for CV text generation, GPT for skill analysis).
